news.title: K-12学校课程标准教学材料使用与科学实践：2025年春季美国教学资源调查结果
news.summary_en: In this report, the authors take stock of the use of instructional materials among kindergarten through grade 12 science teachers. The authors highlight the opportunities for adoption and implementation of standards-aligned instructional materials.
news.original_title: Standards-Aligned Instructional Materials Use and Science Practices in K–12 Schools: Findings from the Spring 2025 American Instructional Resources Survey
news.summary_cn: 兰德公司发布研究报告，基于2025年春季美国教学资源调查数据，分析幼儿园至12年级科学教师使用教学材料的情况。报告强调了采用和实施符合课程标准的教学材料的机会，为改进科学教育提供了实证依据。

news.title: 中国影响力行动对韩国及美韩联盟的影响
news.summary_en: Considering Chinese influence operations and their impacts on South Korean security and society.
news.original_title: Implications of Chinese Influence Operations for South Korea and the US-ROK Alliance
news.summary_cn: 兰德公司研究报告分析中国影响力行动对韩国及美韩联盟的影响，探讨地缘政治变化对地区安全格局的影响。

news.title: 开放模型、软实力与美人工智能竞争谱系
news.summary_en: The authors analyze the United States' and China's respective artificial intelligence (AI) action plans, how AI companies in both countries approach open-source AI models, and the implications for U.S. soft power.
news.original_title: Open Models, Soft Power, and the Spectrum of U.S.-China Artificial Intelligence Competition
news.summary_cn: 兰德公司专家洞见文章，探讨开放AI模型、软实力在美中人工智能竞争中的作用，分析两国在AI领域竞争的不同层面和战略影响。
